Class Task

java.lang.Object
model.AbstractData
model.Task
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObservable, ISerializable
public class Task extends AbstractData
Defines a single task, modelled with a title and additional details as well a completion status, priority, deadline and creation date. It extends AbstractData to provide observability and JSON serialization.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Task.Priority
    Defines the priority levels a task can have.

  • Constructor Details

    • Task

      public Task(org.json.JSONObject taskData)
      Creates a task from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      taskData - the JSON object containing task data. Must include the fields: title, details, isDone, priority, creationDate, and optionally deadline.

    • Task

      public Task()
      Creates an empty task with the current date as the creation date.

  • Method Details

    • toJSON

      public org.json.JSONObject toJSON()
      Serializes this task into a JSON object.
      Returns:
      JSONObject representing this task's data

    • setDetails

      public void setDetails(String details)
      Sets the description of the task.
      Parameters:
      details - task's description

    • toggleDone

      public void toggleDone()
      Toggles the task's completion status.

    • setPriority

      public void setPriority(Task.Priority priority)
      Sets the priority of the task.
      Parameters:
      priority - new priority; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if priority is null

    • setDeadline

      public void setDeadline(LocalDate deadline)
      Sets the deadline of the task.
      Parameters:
      deadline - deadline date, or null to clear it
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the deadline is before the creation date

    • deadlineMissed

      public boolean deadlineMissed()
      Checks if the task missed its deadline.

    • getDetails

      public String getDetails()
      Returns the task's additional details.

    • isDone

      public boolean isDone()
      Returns whether the task is marked as done.

    • getPriority

      public Task.Priority getPriority()
      Returns the priority of the task.

    • getDeadline

      public LocalDate getDeadline()
      Returns the deadline of the task or null if none

    • getCreationDateTime

      public LocalDateTime getCreationDateTime()
      Returns the creation date time of the task.
